mapper.select: SELECT SETTING_ID AS settingId, USER_ID AS userId, PUSH_AGREE AS pushAgree, MARKETING_AGREE AS marketingAgree, LUNCH_PUSH_AGREE AS lunchPushAgree, DINNER_PUSH_AGREE AS dinnerPushAgree, WEEKEND_PUSH_AGREE AS weekendPushAgree, PREFERRED_TIMEZONE AS preferredTimezone, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM LQ_USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING WHERE USER_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING ( SETTING_ID, USER_ID, PUSH_AGREE, MARKETING_AGREE, LUNCH_PUSH_AGREE, DINNER_PUSH_AGREE, WEEKEND_PUSH_AGREE, PREFERRED_TIMEZONE, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{pushAgree}, #{marketingAgree}, #{lunchPushAgree}, #{dinnerPushAgree}, #{weekendPushAgree}, #{preferredTimezone}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING SET PUSH_AGREE = #{pushAgree}, MARKETING_AGREE = #{marketingAgree}, LUNCH_PUSH_AGREE = #{lunchPushAgree}, DINNER_PUSH_AGREE = #{dinnerPushAgree}, WEEKEND_PUSH_AGREE = #{weekendPushAgree}, PREFERRED_TIMEZONE = #{preferredTimezone}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_ID AS subscriptionId, USER_ID AS userId, ENDPOINT AS endpoint, P256DH_KEY AS p256dhKey, AUTH_KEY AS authKey, DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType, BROWSER_NAME AS browserName, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, IS_ACTIVE AS isActive, LAST_SUCCESS_AT AS lastSuccessAt, LAST_FAIL_AT AS lastFailAt, FAIL_COUNT AS failCount, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ENDPOINT = #{endpoint}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION ( SUBSCRIPTION_ID, USER_ID, ENDPOINT, P256DH_KEY, AUTH_KEY, DEVICE_TYPE, BROWSER_NAME, USER_AGENT, IS_ACTIVE, FAIL_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{endpoint}, #{p256dhKey}, #{authKey}, #{deviceType}, #{browserName}, #{userAgent}, #{isActive}, #{failCount}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION SET P256DH_KEY = #{p256dhKey}, AUTH_KEY = #{authKey}, DEVICE_TYPE = #{deviceType}, BROWSER_NAME = #{browserName}, USER_AGENT = #{userAgent}, IS_ACTIVE = #{isActive}, FAIL_COUNT = #{failCount}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE SUBSCRIPTION_ID = #{subscriptionId}
UPDATE LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ENDPOINT = #{endpoint} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_ID AS subscriptionId, USER_ID AS userId, ENDPOINT AS endpoint, P256DH_KEY AS p256dhKey, AUTH_KEY AS authKey, DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType, BROWSER_NAME AS browserName, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, IS_ACTIVE AS isActive, LAST_SUCCESS_AT AS lastSuccessAt, LAST_FAIL_AT AS lastFailAt, FAIL_COUNT AS failCount, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION WHERE USER_ID = #{value} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY SUBSCRIPTION_ID DESC

SELECT PS.USER_ID AS userId, PS.SUBSCRIPTION_ID AS subscriptionId, PS.ENDPOINT AS endpoint, PS.P256DH_KEY AS p256dhKey, PS.AUTH_KEY AS authKey, UNS.PREFERRED_TIMEZONE AS preferredTimezone FROM LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION PS JOIN LQ_USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING UNS ON PS.USER_ID = UNS.USER_ID JOIN LQ_USER U ON U.USER_ID = PS.USER_ID WHERE PS.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND UNS.PUSH_AGREE = 'Y' AND U.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
AND UNS.LUNCH_PUSH_AGREE = 'Y'
AND UNS.DINNER_PUSH_AGREE = 'Y'
AND UNS.WEEKEND_PUSH_AGREE = 'Y'
AND 1 = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_NOTIFICATION_LOG ( NOTIFICATION_ID, USER_ID, SUBSCRIPTION_ID, NOTIFICATION_TYPE, TITLE, BODY, TARGET_URL, SEND_STATUS, FAIL_REASON, SENT_AT, CLICKED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{subscriptionId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{targetUrl}, #{sendStatus}, #{failReason}, #{sentAt}, #{clickedAt}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_NOTIFICATION_LOG SET CLICKED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE NOTIFICATION_ID = #{value} AND CLICKED_AT IS NULL
UPDATE LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION SET LAST_SUCCESS_AT = SYSDATE, FAIL_COUNT = 0, IS_ACTIVE = 'Y', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE SUBSCRIPTION_ID = #{value}

UPDATE LQ_PUSH_SUBSCRIPTION SET LAST_FAIL_AT = SYSDATE, FAIL_COUNT = NVL(FAIL_COUNT, 0) + 1, IS_ACTIVE = CASE WHEN #{forceDeactivate} = 'Y' THEN 'N' WHEN NVL(FAIL_COUNT, 0) + 1 >= 5 THEN 'N' ELSE IS_ACTIVE END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE SUBSCRIPTION_ID = #{subscriptionId}
